name: LedgerPro
tagline: Keep your books clean without the monthly subscription
metaDescription: LedgerPro replaces FreshBooks with professional invoicing and bookkeeping built into AppBuster. Track expenses, send invoices, and run reports — saving $660/year.
heroSvg: <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 100 100"><text x="50" y="70" text-anchor="middle" font-size="60">💰</text></svg>

features.title: Professional Invoicing
features.desc: Create and send branded invoices in seconds with customizable templates. Automate recurring invoices and payment reminders so you spend less time chasing payments.

features.title: Expense Tracking
features.desc: Categorize and track every business expense with receipt capture. Connect bank feeds to automatically import transactions and match them to categories.

features.title: Financial Reports
features.desc: Generate profit and loss statements, balance sheets, and cash flow reports on demand. Filter by date range, client, or project to get the insights you need.

features.title: Online Payments
features.desc: Accept credit card and ACH payments directly through your invoices. Clients pay with one click and funds settle to your account within days.

features.title: Time Tracking
features.desc: Track billable hours per client or project with a built-in timer. Convert tracked time into invoices with a single click for accurate billing.

features.title: Tax Preparation
features.desc: Organize income and expenses by tax category throughout the year. Export tax-ready reports to share with your accountant at filing time.
